programme.title: The Heartbreak Kid (2007)
programme.desc: Ben Stiller stars as Eddie, the 40-year-old confirmed bachelor who finally says "I do" to the beautiful and Lila. But during their honeymoon, the woman of his dreams turns out to be a total nightmare.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: Team America, an international police force dedicated to maintaining global stability learns that a power-hungry dictator is brokering weapons of mass destruction to terrorists.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: The spoof that started it all. Scream with the Wayans brothers, Carmen Electra, Shannon Elizabeth, and Anna Faris as they bumble and shriek their way to horror-movie hilarity in Scary Movie.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Four teens are tricked by their professor into visiting a haunted house for a school project.

programme.title: Scary Movie 3
programme.desc: David Zucker (AIRPLANE!) directs SCARY MOVIE 3, which piles on hysterical, yet gratuitous, cameos with thrillers, blockbusters, and pop-culture in general getting their best goosing yet.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: The Yards
programme.desc: After being released from prison, Leo Handler (Mark Wahlberg) takes a job with his powerfully influential Uncle Frank (James Caan). Leo soon finds himself unwittingly drawn into a world of sabotage, high-stakes payoffs, and even murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Investigative reports on crime and justice cases.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A cell phone video is evidence in a murder trial.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: An inside look at a hostage negotiation team at work focusing on an incident involving 23-year-old Jarrett Jordan, a disturbed man who shot three people and barricaded himself in a house in residential Queens.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When two women are dumped outside hospitals by masked men after a night out, authorities question whether they are good samaritans or if they were involved in the women's death.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Twenty years after a Palm Beach socialite killed her husband, the same gun is used in another shooting in the family.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A teenager who expressed how good killing an elderly couple made him feel may be released from prison at 25 years old due to a controversial new California law.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Authorities charge a teenage baby-sitter with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Confident man Matt Matthews is convicted on eight counts of theft by fraud after manipulating women for their money.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The latest information on George Smith, who disappeared during a honeymoon cruise.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation of two murders leads from the Playboy mansion to Wall Street.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The murders of two young Phoenix, Ariz., women killed 10 months apart in 1992 and 1993 go unsolved for more than two decades until new technology allows police to track a person of interest in an unusual way.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: People who knew boxer Arturo Gatti talk about the man and his suspicious death.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Updates add information about the murder investigation of Sheila Bellush, killed in front of her babies.

programme.desc: Profiling a hall-of-fame basketball coach, a WWII survivor, and a prolific sports writer.

programme.title: The End
programme.desc: When Sonny (Burt Reynolds) is diagnosed with a fatal disease, he swallows a bottle of pills to end it all! Instead, he ends up in a loony bin beside the demented Marlon (Dom DeLuise) who is eager to help Sonny succeed...one madcap attempt at a time!

programme.title: The Bank Shot
programme.desc: Fresh from his recent jailbreak, criminal mastermind George C. Scott is already plotting his next bank heist. This time he's thinking big...he's not just taking the loot, he's stealing the whole bank in a film brimming with imaginative silliness.

programme.title: The Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A major surprise as one of 1976's top-grossing films. THE BAD NEWS BEARS is a movie about children that is refreshing, utterly believable, and quite cleverly funny.

programme.title: Bad News Bears In Breaking Training
programme.desc: The story picks up the Bears career a year after their infamous second-place finish in the North Valley League. Faced with a chance to play the Houston Toros for a shot at the Japanese champs, they devise a way to get Texas to play at the famed Astrodome.

programme.title: Bad News Bears Go To Japan
programme.desc: Caught in a clash of cultures and ready to wreak more havoc on Japan than Godzilla, the Bad News Bears are back this time the Bears are spirited off to Tokyo by a slick and sleazy con artist who sees in the team a perfect peg for a get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: Hit!
programme.desc: U.S. agent Nick Allen (Billy Dee Williams) has his own idea about how to fight a war on drugs: go to the source...and cut the big-time traffickers down. Embittered over the drug-related death of his teenage daughter, Nick sets out to do just that.

programme.title: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: One of the looniest pictures to come along in some time! STIR CRAZY teams two of the most brilliant and zany comic performers today: Richard Pryor and Gene Wilder. Rating: R

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: Rodney Dangerfield plays self-made millionaire Thornton Mellon, owner of a chain of tall and fat clothing stores, who, after divorcing his philandering wife, enrolls in college to keep his son from dropping out.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. Crocodile Dundee is a free-spirited Australian who hunts crocodiles with his bare hands, stares down giant water buffaloes, and drinks mere mortals under the table.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II
programme.desc: Just as the eccentric Australian is starting to adjust to life in New York City, Dundee and his beautiful girlfriend (Linda Kozlowski) are targeted for death by a gang of ruthless drug dealers.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Night of the Creeps
programme.desc: A college couple, in 1959, see an object plummet to Earth like a meteor. The boy swallows a space slug that shoots out. In 1986, two freshmen stumble across the corpse of the boy who swallowed the space slug. Once thawed out, the corpse comes to life.

programme.title: The Blob
programme.desc: THE BLOB has returned in this horrific tale about a vile, malignant life-form that crashes to earth in a cozy, rural American town called Arborville. Untroubled by conscience or intellect, the Blob does only one thing-and does it well. Rated: R

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: David tries to make amends after his first music review gets the artist fired; Valerie ignores Noah's decree to halt the sports betting at the club.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Despite meeting Noah, Donna's hospitalized grandmother says Donna's fated mate is David, who moves out of Valerie's room; Kelly alerts Brandon to a potential story about an ex-con; Steve coaxes Brandon into a double date.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Noah's civil trial begins. His attorney portrays Valerie as a golddigging tramp, and uses the gang's testimony to place Noah in a favorable light. David's record company experiences a shake-up.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: During Valerie's surprise birthday party, Abby announces that she and Bill are engaged. Brandon receives a job offer from a major newspaper but faces a dilemma when he learns he is only being hired as a replacement for striking reporters.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.desc: Mane y Fernanda se van a los golpes. El conclave decide hacerle un examen a Fernanda para evitar su expulsión. Un partido de fútbol entre los Shore y los Big hippo decidirá el futuro de la casa y Pepe recibe una propuesta de amor eterno.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El examen termina y Fernanda se mantiene en la casa. Chile escucha el plan de las rechazadas y las delata. Una maestra de baile pone en su lugar a Mane y a Karime. En un restaurante se desata una batalla campal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Después de enfrentar a Mane, Dania toma una decisión importante. Los Shore reciben una clase de banda donde nace oficialmente el corrido del “Verga muerta”. Jawy habla con Fernanda y Mane está decidida a dejar sola en la casa a Dania.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier y Pepe se enfrentan nuevamente. Un grupo de brujas llega a la casa y no todos quedan contentos con sus premoniciones. En la noche de noche de chicas, Dania le pide una disculpa a Mane y su reacción deja a varios sin palabras.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore se preguntan sobre el paradero de Dania. Chile y Diana tienen una cita romántica. Karime y Mane terminan en el hospital. Pepe y Ramiro reciben una llamada que cambia sus planes y los Shore se alistan para el carnaval.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore llegan el carnaval. Karime y Potro tienen un momento de mucha intimidad. Un hipnotizador llega a la casa. Nacha tiene sospechas y decide hacerse una prueba de embarazo y una nueva integrante llega a las vacaciones.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Karime le hacen un amarre a sus amados y Nacha explota contra Jey. Potro sorprende a Isa besando a Chile y se molesta. Mane se entera de que Potro está hablando mal de Jawy y toma cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La situación entre Jawy y Potro es cada vez más tensa. Las nuevas se lanzan topless de la tirolesa. Nacha confronta a Isa, mientras que Jawy decide que la playa es el lugar perfecto para aclarar las cosas con Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía llega de sorpresa y los lleva de fiesta. Nacha va al hospital. Chile por fin corona con Isa. Los Shores tienen una sesión con Silvia Olmedo; Karime vuelve con Ramiro y trae ganas de trío. Entre Fer e Isa hay pleito de celos por Chile.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores se preparan para el fin de la aventura en Mazatlán. Los invitados llegan a celebrar la fiesta final. Potro y Tadeo aparecen cuando ya está el pleno desmadre y un incidente entre las mujeres de Chile está a punto de explotar.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final termina en pleito entre el harén de Chile. Mane le prepara a Jawy una ceremonia sorpresa para ratificar su amor. Los Shores se van de la casa, pero Karime y Potro dejan lo mejor para el final.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: El Talismán

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Elvira discute con Camila sobre Renato, desconfía de que él sea millonario y cree que está intentando utilizar a su madre. Elvira no quiere investigar a Renato y la obliga a elegir entre ella y Pedro.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Pedro le pide matrimonio a Camila. Ella accede y aprovecha la ocasión para decirle que está dispuesta a ayudarle a encontrar a Mariana, para hacerle lugar a su matrimonio.

programme.title: El Talismán

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes crispy pan-fried pork chops, roasted butternut squash salad with za'atar and parsley, and a super-simple spinach salad.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia celebrates with an indoor clambake made with fresh lobster, mussels, and clams, and served with honey cornbread and bistro slaw.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We traveled to chili country, cooked with various experts in their kitchens, and tried out dozens of recipes in the test kitchen. We wanted a chili that would be hearty, heavy on the meat, and spicy but not overwhelmingly hot.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork chops are leaner than they used to be, which poses new problems for home cooks. We explain which chops to buy and how to cook them, ensuring perfectly cooked meat that is both crispy and juicy.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Real country bread, the kind made by an artisan and never found at the supermarket, is a thing of beauty. We wanted to develop a recipe that was every bit as good as the best country loaves but that was still doable for the cook who bakes in a home oven.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Thick, chewy chocolate cookies and spiced molasses cookies are classics. Watch as we discover which types of chocolate and molasses make these favorites great again.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more American than strawberry shortcake? But sometimes this classic summer fare can go terribly wrong. When it comes to cherry cobbler, sour cherries are a must. But where do you get sour cherries? Are jarred cherries a worthy alternative?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who can resist a chocolate cake? We wanted cakes that would be great tasting and easy to prepare, and we came up with two: old-fashioned, moist, and homey; the other elegant, dense, and ethereal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to create flavorful, fresh-tasting versions of Greek and spinach salads.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Chili is probably America's favorite one-pot supper and we wanted to create a great, simple version. And while no one thinks of a clambake as a one-pot wonder, we set out to make an indoor version simple enough to prepare even on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We go to the test kitchen to show how to make the perfect clam chowder and delicious crab cakes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we figure out the best recipes for two New Orleans favorites—Jambalaya and bananas Foster.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tomatoes and pasta are a classic (and delicious) pairing, but sometimes you want a change. Vegetable sauces, like the two featured in this episode—one with mushrooms and one with broccoli rabe—are appealing options.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some pasta dishes take considerable time to prepare. But others don't have to. We set out to streamline Bolognese and baked four-cheese pasta to make them weeknight dining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When it comes out right, pot roast is tender, succulent, and richly flavored. Good pot roast begins at the market, and we've found that cooking technique matters just as much as the cut.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork producers have worked so hard to remove fat from their pigs that most pork roasts have little character. Glazing a pork roast with maple syrup is an attractive way to boost flavor and we wanted to perfect this recipe.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Truckers often know where to find the best home-style cooking. And what could be better than chicken-fried steak with cream gravy and real coconut cream pie?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although chicken dinners are quick to prepare, they can go terribly wrong. Part of the problem is the chicken itself—the breast meat has little fat and becomes dry and chalky if overcooked. The other major source of trouble is improper cooking methods.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: French country cooking has a way with chicken in a pot, whether it's the famous chicken with 40 cloves of garlic or the lesser-known chicken Provençal. These dishes take chicken to new heights—or go awry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Purchase a good steak and cook it properly, and all it needs is salt and pepper—and, of course, a side of spuds. We wanted potatoes with perfect texture and big flavor—something unusual to accompany a great steak and a good bottle of wine.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Restaurant steak tips are often tough and weirdly seasoned, and thick steak fries can be pale and soggy. The test kitchen felt confident that we could rescue these dishes and turn them into something you would welcome into your home.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A maximum-security prison is responsible for educating and rehabilitating teenage gang members, sex offenders and juveniles with mental health issues; inside the razor wire fences, anything can happen, and some days are more chaotic than others.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The inmates at Indiana's Pendleton Juvenile Correctional Facility aren't sentenced in terms of years; they get out when they achieve certain goals, no matter how long that takes.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Welcome to Limon Correctional Facility, a level 4 prison that houses many of Colorado's most dangerous inmates; while visiting Limon Correctional, the Lockup crew is greeted by angry inmates and the cell extraction team is called in to help.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: When Travis Trani took charge in 2008 he oversaw the implementation of several new policies; the restrictions on movement were among the toughest; inmates from the six different housing units could no longer freely move throughout the prison.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison is an underground economy, where some deals are signed in ink and others are signed in blood; a rare look at the schemes, hustles and extortions conducted behind prison walls and the consequences they carry.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Extractions provide some of the most dramatic interactions that ever occur between inmates and staff, and few extractions in the state of Colorado have provided more drama than the ones involving Roy Slagle.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: One reality of prison is that there's never a shortage of pain, and at the Limon Correctional Facility in Colorado, there's enough left over for the visitors as well; drama unfolds as a father and son try to reconcile a violent past.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Even for inmates serving hard time, love can be a strong motivator; in prison, reaching out to others can be a dicey proposition; some inmates just don't know when someone's getting too close until it's too late.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Pendleton Juvenile is the last stop in Indiana for young offenders who have committed serious crimes; the staff there must always be prepared for the unexpected, and is determined to rehabilitate impulsive teens who are often angry and violent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Sorrowful Successor
programme.desc: Conquering his own fear, an unlikely star opens an opportunity for Zeppeli and Jonathan. But as a prophecy from Zeppeli’s past unfolds dramatically in a clash of life, death, and succession, a true hero triumphs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bloody Battle! JoJo & Dio
programme.desc: With sword in hand and a team of Hamon masters at his side, Jonathan sets out to save Poco’s sister. When one slithery demon makes its move, Jonathan steps in, igniting an all-out war with his “brother.”

programme.title: Death Note: Vigilance
programme.desc: Aizawa figures out what's going on and tells Near, who already knows about the notes.

programme.title: Death Note: Malice
programme.desc: Light gives Kiyomi the order to finish off Near.

programme.title: Death Note: 1.28
programme.desc: Near, along with the SPK, meets Light and the task force at a warehouse for the final showdown.

programme.title: Death Note: New World
programme.desc: Though Mikami has written all the investigators' names in the Death Note, a minute passes and everyone is still alive.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Phantom Troupe finds out that Kurapika is the one who killed Uvogin.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kurapika has captured Chrollo and negotiates an exchange for Gon and Killua with Pakunoda.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The auction for the game Greed Island finally begins.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua join the tryouts to become Greed Island players.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua enter the world of Greed Island in hopes of finding Ging, but all they find is a message left by him.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua head for Masadora, the City of Magic, in search of spell cards.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Biscuit announces to Gon and Killua that she will be their teacher.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua wrap up their training, while the Bomber appears before the players who had formed an alliance.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dio the Invader
programme.desc: On a stormy night in Victorian England, a coach carrying an aristocratic family meets with disaster, forever changing the fate of its sole survivors, George and Jonathan Joestar.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: A Letter From the Past
programme.desc: Hostility grows between Jonathan and his adopted brother, Dio, as forgotten secrets emerge. Do the sinister slums of London hold the secret to the mask and Jonathan’s suspicions?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jonathan and his new comrade, Speedwagon, confront Dio but are caught off guard when a savage reversal sends shock waves through the Joestar family.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Overdrive
programme.desc: Fate arranges the meeting of a broken Jonathan and the mysterious Zeppeli, master of Hamon energy. Meanwhile, one particularly savage vampire recruit hopes to slice his way to victory.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Dark Knights
programme.desc: Terror follows Jonathan and his fellow travelers to Windknight’s Lot, where they find themselves faced with the devious Dio. The onslaught of evil continues with two colossal knights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Tomorrow's Courage
programme.desc: Just as Jonathan’s heroism transforms one foe’s hatred into humanity, an even greater behemoth drives the crew to a knightly training camp, complete with a medieval chamber of death.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Sorrowful Successor
programme.desc: Conquering his own fear, an unlikely star opens an opportunity for Zeppeli and Jonathan. But as a prophecy from Zeppeli’s past unfolds dramatically in a clash of life, death, and succession, a true hero triumphs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bloody Battle! JoJo & Dio
programme.desc: With sword in hand and a team of Hamon masters at his side, Jonathan sets out to save Poco’s sister. When one slithery demon makes its move, Jonathan steps in, igniting an all-out war with his “brother.”

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: As the sealing ceremony begins, Yuri loses his focus when Wolfram attacks while a shadow appears, grabbing the keys to the boxes and opening them. From within appears the Great One himself, but Murata and Josak spring into action to stop him from opening

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With Wolfram's heart stopped, Yuri vows to save him, while Murata reveals the Great One's true plans involving the former Demon Queen...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The Great One begins a two-front attack on both the Demon Kingdom and Earth, but as Yuri returns the three keys to Conrad, Gwendal, and Wolfram, he is betrayed by one of his own!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With the Great One inside Yuri's body, his plan falls into motion, while Shori trains with Ulrike to control his powers, and Ganter starts to develop a strategy to stop the Great One.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the end of the road for Charlie Ross and Natasha Raskin as they set off from Ashby De La Zouche in Leicestershire. With only a few pounds separating them, who will win at the climactic auction in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new week and a new pairing as Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning hit the road on the hunt for antique treasures. They begin their epic adventure in Ford, aiming for their first auction in Leyburn, North Yorkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning continue their antique adventure with Anita in the lead, having won the first auction. Can Paul catch her up as they go from the steel city of Sheffield, heading for auction in Luddendenfoot, West Yorkshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's an auction apiece for Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning as they reach the halfway point of their Antiques Road Trip. This leg sees them begin in South Cave in the East Riding of Yorkshire, aiming for auction in Twickenham, London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning head for round four at auction and they both have their eyes on the prize. Starting out in Navenby, Lincolnshire they make their way towards the penultimate auction in the Norfolk town of Diss.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning. There are only a few pounds separating this competitive duo as they begin in Norwich, and head for a nail-biting final auction in Stamford, Licolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw kick off a new season in Suffolk and Cambridgeshire. Armed with £200 each, and an ailing pickup truck, they shop up a storm before heading to an auction in Market Harborough.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques hunters Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw shop across Gloucestershire and Northamptonshire before going head-to-head at an auction in Evesham, Worcestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Travelling through Hertfordshire, Buckinghamshire, and the West Midlands, Paul Laidlaw uncovers a hidden gem that could win him the trip. All is revealed when he and Christina Trevanion auction their lots in Nantwich, Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw travel through Shropshire and Worcestershire. Paul gets security clearance to visit Iron Mountain and Christina learns about the origins of the modern Olympic movement in Much Wenlock.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion are taking in the delights of Staffordshire and Cheshire. Paul has had amazing success on this trip; can Christina catch up as they head towards their final auction in Northwich?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: New expert Raj Bisram joins the road trip. This auctioneer from Kent is taking on Charles Hanson as they shop around Berkshire, Wiltshire and Somerset, before heading to their first auction showdown in Winchcombe.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's leg two for auctioneers Charles Hanson and Raj Bisram, and they're taking their Triumph through Somerset, Dorset and Hampshire before ending at an auction in Swanmore.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trip veteran Charles Hanson is halfway through a week of adventure with new recruit, Raj Bisram. The duelling auctioneers travel though Dorset and Somerset in their Triumph before heading for an auction in Bridgwater.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team head to Exmouth on the Devon coast.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow spreads out its picnic rug in the beautiful gardens of Powis castle in Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team make some surprising finds at Rochester Cathedral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Rochester Cathedral, including a toast with Napoleon's drinking glass.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit an iconic modernist building, the De La Warr Pavilion at Bexhill-on-Sea.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit the Queen Mother's former residence, and brave the Scottish weather.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are at St George's Hall in Liverpool to uncover some valuable finds.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team return to St George's Hall in Liverpool to uncover some more valuable finds.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team visit Kentwell Hall in Suffolk.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit De Montfort Hall in Leicester, and things take a theatrical turn.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team visit the Coronation Hall in Ulverston.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After getting out of the service, Navy vet Barry decided to buy an Ohio biker bar, but his lack of experience and the bar's prior reputation force him to call Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help a former baseball player turned bar owner whose refusal to upgrade his inn allowed competing bars to lure his customers away.

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Katy, Texas, to save Bryant's Ice House, which is plagued by a bad reputation, an even worse location and a wild staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When the original owners of The Dugout near Wrigley Field fell behind on their rent, the landlord took over and became one of the most obstinate bar owners Jon has ever met.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After suffering a stroke, the owner of Desi Romano's Sports Bar & Grill risks losing his family legacy if Jon can't help him bounce back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads back to Puerto Rico to help brother-and-sister bar owners who saw their business devastated by Hurricane Maria.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his second-ever re-rescue, Jon Taffer returns to Champagne's Cafe to help the struggling bar survive the pandemic and maintain its Las Vegas legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to help save a bar whose controversial lobster-tank claw-machine game drew protests from animal rights activists, which in turn drove away customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An outrageous owner spends more time swinging from the rafters than managing his bar, and Jon is ready to abandon the rescue if the owner doesn't face reality.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After losing his rookie partner in the mysterious rescue of what he thinks is a ghost, Eddie gets unwittingly caught up in a 70-year-old legend. Meanwhile, Hobie attempts to help a friend find a new home for her dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A local restaurateur puts up a $25,000 bounty for the largest shark caught during the weekend's Shark Derby he's sponsoring. To attract more sharks, he illegally chums the waters, drawing hundreds of sharks uncommonly close to shore.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cort promises to come up with $10,000 for a nursing home, but he needs Mitch and Craig's help to compete in a water-skiing race with a big cash prize. Shauni’s traumatic fear of the ocean after Jill’s death threatens her future with Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig, Mitch, and Garner go for a weekend hang-gliding trip, but Mitch has a serious accident, and ends up facing death before the fangs of a rattlesnake! Cort reacquaints himself with a woman who has a shocking secret.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A massive earthquake destroys Baywatch headquarters and leaves Gina's life hanging in the balance. Meanwhile, Cort and Craig are trapped in the ocean. And Eddie is the only one left who can help a pregnant woman going into labor.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch rescues an underwater photographer that appears to have been attacked by a Sea Creature in an underwater cave, resulting in a media frenzy. Shauni rescues a young girl in the ocean then has to rescue her family from drowning.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a fishing trawler mysteriously sinks, the “Creature in the Bay” is thought responsible! Mitch, Devon and Captain Thorpe set out to prove there is more than meets the eye behind this Creature's mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life-threatening. Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank recibe una orden de la alcaldesa para asistir a un desfile en honor a un hombre que estuvo en prisión por conspirar en un ataque contra la policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que nuevas pruebas revelen que el asesino de Puerto a Puerto se ha infiltrado en la agencia, los equipos del NCIS siguen todas las pistas en una carrera por localizarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, las vidas de los miembros del NCIS corren peligro cuando se enfrentan cara a cara con el infame asesino de Puerto a Puerto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los cuerpos de dos víctimas de asesinato se encuentran en una comunidad de West Virginia, el UAC descubre una disputa latente desde hacía tiempo entre dos familias, y se debe investigar cuál de ellos podría ser responsable de la muerte.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Eight modern-day cowboys and cowgirls train to compete for the first-ever million-dollar prize in horse reining, one of the toughest and most dangerous sports in the world.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: As the riders prepare for the Cactus Classic, Matt struggles when his horse has health issues, and Abby feels the pressure in her first competition since going solo.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Leading up to the Run for a Million show, Andrea undercuts Matt's search for the perfect horse, Abby deals with a flooded practice arena, and Craig seeks a much-needed payday.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: At the National Reining Breeders Classic, Jason has a chance to prove his skills equal Andrea's, and Cade has to come through in the clutch.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Abby faces a tough decision, Casey deals with mounting home-construction costs, and the pressure rises as the riders choose the horses they'll take to Run for a Million.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: In the first annual Run for a Million in Las Vegas, the riders compete for the first-ever million-dollar purse in horse-reining history.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The top trainers in the sport of horse reining dial up the heat in Arizona as they try to qualify for this year's Run For A Million -- giving them a shot at the largest purse in the history of the sport.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the final qualifiers selected for this year's Run For A Million, it's back to the ranches as the McCutcheon dynasty gets back to business. After missing the qualifier, Abby Lengel must begin the process of trying to get back into the competition.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Andrea, Matt, and Craig share the struggles and joys of the sport they love while training some of the next generation's brightest reining stars -- their children.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey on the wrong side of the highway. Officers sets up a reverse sting operation designed to capture a suspected drug dealer. Officers decide to pull over a driver who intentionally avoided a road block.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop leads to an altercation with an armed passenger, a man is accused of assault while searching for marijuana, and a woman on probation has mismatched plates.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle tries to force an off-duty deputy off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her husband's potential lover. A hostile man is out-of-control at a local residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unruly man gives deputies a hard time, witnesses call the cops when a well-dressed driver plows through multiple barricades, and a domestic call takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vigilant neighbor calls the police when he sees a man robbing a liquor store, and a driver refuses to pull over while driving his new friend's truck.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.desc: Chabelo y Pepito van de excursión con un grupo de scouts y se enfrentan al peligro en una cueva maldita. La aventura comienza cuando encuentran a varios monstruos y deciden destruirlos.

programme.title: Chabelo y pepito detectives
programme.desc: Un comandante amigo de Chabelo y Pepito les pide que lo ayuden a descubrir una banda que rapta niños. Ellos aceptan y se infiltran en la banda para descubrir que los villanos son seres de otro planeta

programme.title: El gran rescate
programme.desc: En medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, el Batallón nro. 6 de exploradores recibe una misión de proporciones heroicas: ir 50 kilómetros tras las líneas enemigas y liberar a más de 500 prisioneros de guerra estadounidenses.

programme.title: La hija del general
programme.desc: Existe la forma correcta, la forma equivocada y la forma del ejército. Pero bajo ninguna circunstancia, el investigador militar Paul Brenner ayudará a los oficiales de Fort MacCallum a encubrir el motivo de la muerte de una hermosa oficial.

programme.title: Motín a bordo
programme.desc: Un viaje idílico a Tahití enfrentará a la tripulación y su capitán, cuando tras encontrar un paraíso tropical y sexo ilimitado, el capitán decide zarpar y adentrar a su tripulación en un peligroso viaje alrededor del Cabo de Hornos.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La hija del general

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Sobreviviendo
programme.desc: Son cinco años después y Tony Manero sigue ardiendo. Ahora se pavonea hacia un desafío aún mayor, hacerlo como un bailarín en el escenario de Broadway.

programme.title: Hechizo de Luna
programme.desc: Cher (en una actuación ganadora del Oscar) como una viuda que está lista para volver a casarse. Pero cuando se enamora del hermano de su prometido (Nicolas Cage), surge una complicación romántica digna de una de las mejores comedias.

programme.title: Mystic Pizza
programme.desc: En esta tierna historia de anhelos de juventud, Julia Roberts, Annabeth Gish y Lili Taylor, son tres chicas trabajando en una pizzería y soñando con un futuro brillante fuera de su pueblecito Mystic, Connecticut.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: El regreso de los muertos vivientes
programme.desc: En su primer día en un almacén de material médico, Freddy (Thom Mathews) libera sin querer un gas tóxico de un contenedor militar secreto. El gas reanima un ejército de cadáveres, que salen de la tumba con un hambre voraz... ¡de cerebros!

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins

programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A black funeral wreath on his office door predicts Barnaby's death on Sunday. Even after he figures out who the psycho ex-convict is with a vendetta against him, Barnaby is stymied until his daughter-in-law is held hostage.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A shamed Japanese banker ritualistically kills himself, and McGarrett want to know why. McGarrett demands answers from a prominent financial consultant and the deceased's assistant when Five-O discovers the pair are involved in an international swindle.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett digs into a 33-year-old mystery when he links a Honolulu murder to a missing, anthropologically valuable human fossil that disappeared in China shortly before Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Former madam, Maybelle Cheseboro, has returned to Sparta, but this time with a legitimate phone sex business, instead of a brothel. Meanwhile, a city official, Drew Ward, is linked to the death of Jessica Lund, one of Maybelle’s phone workers.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Chief Forbes starts a boxing program in Sparta to help young men at risk and has taken a special interest in one kid with a lot of promise, Kevin Brooks; however, Forbes soon discovers that Kevin is involved in a series of burglaries in town.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Lieutenant Lonnie Jamison’s wealthy aunt, Cordelia Woodlin, is back in Sparta and spending time with her very old and dear friend, blues singer Ches Collins; that is until Ches starts receiving racist death threats warning him to stay away from her.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Soon after Virgil Tibbs is hired by a local law firm, a pair of wealthy clients, the Bookers, are in a car accident; Chuck Booker survives, but Abby is killed. Chuck claims he was dodging a deer, but Tibbs suspects that Abby’s death was no accident.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A new synagogue in Sparta is plagued by vandalism, but when the temple is destroyed and the sacred Torah is stolen, Rabbi Feldman refuses Sheriff Gillespie’s help based on a decades-old anti-Semitic crime that Gillespie apparently helped cover up.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While trying to keep his buddy Justin out of trouble, Eugene Glendon jeopardizes his probation when he is seen leaving the scene of a robbery at a local gas station. Meanwhile, Eugene insists his mother Harriet choose between him and Bill Gillespie.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: The Maury Show: Take the Test ... Did You Cheat?
programme.desc: These women are at their wit's end because they suspect their lovers of infidelity. These men swear that they’re just crazy or jealous, but Maury’s got the lie detector results!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Instead of chocolates and dinners, these guests are being cheated on and dumped. Love may be blind, but lie detector tests and hidden cameras will reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 22-year-old Vernetta says 55-year-old Ronnie is her son's father and lied about his age when they hooked up! Next, is Krystal sleeping with her own relatives? Could their kids not be his? Plus, Keke returns to tell Tyrone a secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: MAURY’s guests have been keeping devastating secrets from their loved ones and it is tearing them up inside. They are ready to come clean, even if it means losing their relationships! Will their loved ones stay or go?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Two years ago Chelsea admitted that she was secretly cheating on her boyfriend Corey with his friend, but he forgave her. Does she need to know who fathered her baby? Then, Liz and Bailey have bonded over Josh fathering their kids!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Darius already took a DNA test to prove if he is the father of Timisha's baby, but she thinks it was tainted! Then, 4-month pregnant Brittney wants her boyfriend Bruce to admit that he's the father. Later, did Caitlin have Eric's baby?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brittany thinks Dionte is her baby’s dad and will prove it! Then, 24-year-old Melissa claims 47-year-old Rob fathered her baby, but Rob’s daughter wants proof! Plus, is Crystal’s baby’s dad her ex, ex’s cousin, or her husband?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!
programme.desc: They ran, they ranted...but what happened when they went home? Today, some past guests return for more tests! Plus the winner of Maury’s Future Stars 2013 will be announced.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Things were once great for today's guests, but after these women revealed they were pregnant, the relationships were no longer so rosy. These women want to prove to their men they ARE the father and need to be responsible for their children.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Will 25-year-old Katrina prove that 50-year-old Christopher fathered her baby and silence his new fiancé Suprina? Is Johnny or a married man the father of Sarah’s baby? Plus, Robert denies fathering 2 women’s babies!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shantice is worried sick that her husband is cheating on her with prostitutes. Could Heather's fiancé have impregnated another woman? Plus, Karlissa's world may shatter when she finds out if her man cheated on her with her best friend.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: John aspires to be a rapper and says Dabria wants to trap him with someone else's baby due to his future success. Then, can a mom keep her daughter away from her controlling boyfriend? Later, is Kelly's very sick baby Brandon's?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On today's MAURY… these women are turning to MAURY for something more than excuses. They need RESULTS! After the truth is revealed, will these fathers finally face the music, or will these moms have to continue their searches?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time Lissett was on the show, she proved to her man Orlando that she was not a cheater. This time Lissett's sister has something crazy to confess! Then, Dretta's convinced that James is plowing more than other women's driveways.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Nick denies Chantelle's baby, but she wants to prove he's the father and make him pay up. Mario's mother Evette says she went "undercover" to prove that Sierra cheated on her son and that he is not her baby's father! What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki's boyfriend Tavon is cheating on her. What will they say when they watch him on our hidden cameras? Then, was Naomi's fiancé able to resist our sexy decoy? Plus, is Jeremiah's baby with Robin really his?

programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Apenas unas semanas antes de que una testigo testifique contra el hombre acusado de agredirla sexualmente, ella es asesinada en el patio delantero de su propia casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, un terrorista en serie apunta a un juez, dos abogados e incluso a una casa de la corte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ocurre un accidente y los responsables se dan a la fuga, causando la muerte de un joven muy popular. Los investigadores se ven enfrentados con la tarea de buscar un barco entre otros 1200.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer fue identificado como el hombre que violó y estranguló a cinco jóvenes mujeres en Virginia. Con el uso de perfiles de ADN, se libera a un hombre inocente y se condena al verdadero asesino.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With three girls left to cut and the first game around the corner, the pressure is intense as the girls return to AT&T Stadium to take the field for the first time since auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.desc: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
